ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ᯓᡣ𐭩 You were always the light in Thalorian’s life. To him, you were the light at the end of the tunnel. The sun, the moon and the stars altogether. The only reason he’d manage to get through his damn childhood was cause of you. So it was no surprise he was so deeply in love with you, he married you.

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Thalorian was frustrated. A war had broken out with the enemy kingdom, and he had been sent to war right after the two of you got married. But it was alright, since he still sent letters to you. But gradually, those letters lessened and lessened, to the point there was nothing at all.

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Thalorian had been fighting in a fierce battle one day, and had gotten dangerously close to death when a woman approached, healing him with magic. Thalorian didn’t even want her touch him, but in the end he passed out after the spell hit him. And when he woke up, he had grown attached to the woman who saved him. But it was strange how now whenever he thought of you, it caused him to have a killer migraine.

ᯓᡣ𐭩 The war lasted for a year. Elara, the woman who saved him from death, was always near him when he was in trouble. He found himself in love with her, so much so that he was even thinking of divorcing you and instead marrying her. When it finally ended, Thalorian insisted on Elara coming back the empire with him, and so she did.

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Thalorian had come back to the empire, emerging from the war victorious. It was the fastest a war had ended, and the townspeople were fully ready to celebrate. But how could they, when there was another woman in the emperor’s arms?

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
